# zillizcloud_private_endpoint (Resource)

Manages a private link endpoint for a Zilliz Cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zillizcloud_private_endpoint" "aws" {
  project_id  = "proj-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
  region_id   = "aws-us-west-2"
  endpoint_id = "vpce-072eaf2b4a747c24f"
}

# GCP example — gcp_project_id is required
resource "zillizcloud_private_endpoint" "gcp" {
  project_id     = "proj-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
  region_id      = "gcp-us-west1"
  endpoint_id    = "my-psc-endpoint"
  gcp_project_id = "my-gcp-project"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint_id` (String) VPC endpoint ID.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID.
- `region_id` (String) Cloud region ID.

### Optional

- `gcp_project_id` (String) GCP project ID (required for GCP regions).

### Read-Only

- `cloud_id` (String)
- `endpoint_service` (String)
- `endpoint_service_status` (String)
- `endpoint_status` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
